product.name: ArWoWear T7 Soft
descriptions: ArWoWear T7 Soft is light weight 245 g/m², %60 Cotton %40 Polyester merserized workwear fabric with ultra comfort.
It is the economical version of ArWoWear T7 series.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1000N; Weft>800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Generic workwear/coverall application listed, but no explicit military or uniformed-service use stated.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is an economical cotton-polyester twill workwear fabric explicitly intended for coveralls, with no explicit mention of any specific sector such as military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hi-vis, medical, sport, architecture or transport.
